lineage.method: SP-K short replacement / veto deployment on top of the former v6_h10d parent. Keep the core-20 universe, same regime-gating overlay, same top-3/bottom-3 construction; only allow one marginal short-slot replacement near the baseline cutoff when a mid-liquidity post-pump-stall name appears in the tail.

doc_e12_falsification_2026_04_29.result: PASS - t=+10.75 strongly significant, 4x the doc 2.5 sigma floor

admission_audit_2026_04_29.weight_calibration: Conservative initial pick. Raw IC 0.052 x v91 ratio 3.25 = 0.17 (would be aggressive). F62 lesson at IC -0.024 -> w=-0.08 was Pareto-optimal; transferring that ratio (~3.3) to recency_score gives w~=0.17 but conservatism suggests starting at 0.10 (~50% of theoretical) and scanning up.

spk_admission_extension_2026_05_01.selected_over_sibling: post_pump_stall_core_score_3d preferred over post_pump_stall_oi_score_3d after cycle-layer evaluation

promotion_decision_2026_05_02.reason: This is the first SP-K landing shape that materially improves the healthy h10d parent strategy while preserving the parent loss-window profile. Follow-up selected-short news and MF-01 challenger variants remain useful diagnostics, but none beats the stable tail-quality / basket-quality trade-off of the no-news short-slot replacement.

thesis_profile.market_mechanism: Attach SP-K as a short-selection replacement rule to v6_h10d. Keep the active parent strategy on `liquid_perp_core_20`; preserve the long leg; only replace marginal baseline short names when a mid-liquidity post-pump-stall candidate sits just above the short cutoff.
thesis_profile.directional_claim: The main strategy already identifies the broad short book well. SP-K should help only on the boundary: do not perturb the whole cross-section, but allow a nearby mid-liquidity post-pump-stall name to replace a weaker baseline short. Claim fails if walk-forward / regime trade-offs do not improve or at least preserve the active parent while improving short-basket economics.
thesis_profile.factor_formula: baseline = v6_h10d_raw; longs unchanged; shorts start from baseline bottom-3. If a mid-liquidity name in the bottom tail has sufficiently negative post_pump_stall z-score, it may replace a weaker current short. Final score is re-ranked only to encode that discrete replacement rule.

research_only_reason: Demoted after the audit-repair sequence. The result remains useful SP-K factor evidence, but it is built on the legacy v6_h10d + regime_gating_v2 parent rather than the canonical v5_rw_bridge_no_overlay_h10d parent. Future SP-K variants must attach to v5_rw_bridge_no_overlay_h10d and pass fixed-set paired comparison plus overlay ablation before becoming promotable.

followup_challengers_2026_05_01.selected_short_news_veto: validation-pass but not promoted; loss_window_fraction worsens to 0.34375 and worst_regime worsens to -2.391725386150468
followup_challengers_2026_05_01.selected_short_reduced_exposure: fast-reject-pass but not promoted; loss_window_fraction worsens to 0.34375 and weighted short-basket next_10d mean weakens to about -0.23%

verified_outcome_2026_05_01.note: Promoted as the canonical baseline because it is the best validated parent-strategy landing shape for SP-K so far: it materially improves walk-forward and worst-regime outcomes without sacrificing loss-window stability.
